source_pr.title: tikv: refine commit backoff slow log
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? 1. we don't know how much time cause by backoff for a slow commit https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/f05a27d0bb2af157222840133860dd41d68ebde7/store/tikv/2pc.go#L409 will fork or clone a new backoff to parallel handle key groups and this let backoff time be miss in commit slow log 2. when we have known a commit is slow due to backoff, but we don't know why it backoff ### What is changed and how it works? - record delta sleep into parent backoff to let backoff accurate for commit operation - add backoffTypes fields to commit slow log after them, we can got log like this: ``` # Time: 2019-08-16T16:32:02.281654197+08:00 # Txn_start_ts: 410502908375465985 # User: root@127.0.0.1 # Conn_ID: 1 # Query_time: 0.132051478 # Prewrite_time: 0.101346878 Commit_time: 0.030348021 Get_commit_ts_time: 0.000101586 Commit_backoff_time: 0.1 Backoff_types: [tikvRPC regionMiss] Local_latch_wait_time: 2.288e-06 Write_keys: 1 Write_size: 23 Prewrite_region: 2 # DB: test # Is_internal: false # Digest: db305e24a5f7a0ae2c46a1770efa5150459b121ac3dc1ce39ba5645a4f8521ff # Num_cop_tasks: 0 # Cop_proc_avg: 0 Cop_proc_p90: 0 Cop_proc_max: 0 Cop_proc_addr: # Cop_wait_avg: 0 Cop_wait_p90: 0 Cop_wait_max: 0 Cop_wait_addr: # Succ: false insert into t VALUES(1); ``` this insert is slow due to prewrite is slow and backoff take most time in prewrite. and backoff type is `Backoff_types: [tikvRPC regionMiss]` ``` Commit_backoff_time: 0.1 Backoff_types: [tikvRPC regionMiss] ``` ### Check List Tests - Manual test Code changes - log record change Side effects - n/a Related changes - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/11757)

fix_pattern: tikv: refine commit backoff slow log

evidence: evidence: fix race & add backoff types
